title: Ram #7410
definition:
Ram = "high" or "exalted"

 1) a Judaite, son of Hezron, father of Amminadab, and ancestor of David
 2) a Judaite, son of Jerahmeel
 3) a kindred of Elihu, the friend of Job
nasbUsage:
Definition: Ram = "high" or "exalted"

 1) a Judaite, son of Hezron, father of Amminadab, and ancestor of David
 2) a Judaite, son of Jerahmeel
 3) a kindred of Elihu, the friend of Job

    NASB:  two Isr., also family of Elihu
